title: Pretty Accurate Beta
description: Want to transform Minecraft 1.21.1 with Fabric into Beta 1.7_01?
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bbb46cde97db7a3ce2c83b252465b0738c08ec4.png)

This modpack transforms Minecraft 1.21.1 with Fabric into Minecraft Beta 1.7_01

It also has ViaFabricPlus so you can even join old Beta Servers. Isn't that great?

Don't forget that this modpack is an unofficial heavily edited version of [1:1 Beta](https://modrinth.com/modpack/1to1-beta).

Link to Vulkanised Accurate Beta: https://modrinth.com/modpack/vulkanised-accurate-beta

Link to the GitHub Version: https://github.com/nonnButter/pretty-accurate-beta

Differences between Fabric and Quilt
--------------------------------------------------------------
|Fabric|Quilt|Fabric (Demo)|
|:----|:----|:----|
|Compatible with Fabric|(Mostly) Compatible with Fabric|Compatible with Fabric|
|Bundled with [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus)|Bundled with [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus)|[ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus) not included!|
|Small difference to the Quilt Version|Small difference to the Fabric Version|Noticeable difference compared to the Fabric and Quilt Version|
